# Compose Orchestration Reference

## Profile-Based Architecture

All services use Docker Compose profiles to support hardware-adaptive deployment:
- `cpu` — Universal fallback, no hardware acceleration
- `nvidia` — CUDA acceleration via NVIDIA Container Toolkit
- `intel` — OpenVINO / iGPU / NPU via device passthrough

Usage:
```bash
docker compose --profile cpu up        # CPU-only
docker compose --profile nvidia up     # NVIDIA GPU
docker compose --profile intel up      # Intel iGPU/NPU
```

## Compose Template Structure

```yaml
# compose.yaml
# Generated by Containerization Skill
#
# Usage:
#   CPU Only:    docker compose --profile cpu up -d
#   NVIDIA GPU:  docker compose --profile nvidia up -d
#   Intel iGPU:  docker compose --profile intel up -d

services:

  # ==========================================
  # DATA LAYER
  # ==========================================

  postgres-vector:
    image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME:-app}-postgres
    profiles: [cpu, nvidia, intel]
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: ${DB_USER:-admin}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASS:-changeme}
      POSTGRES_DB: ${DB_NAME:-app_db}
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./infra/database/init.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sql
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${DB_USER:-admin}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    networks:
      - app-network

  redis-cache:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME:-app}-redis
    profiles: [cpu, nvidia, intel]
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes --requirepass ${REDIS_PASS:-changeme}
    volumes:
      - redisdata:/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "${REDIS_PASS:-changeme}", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
    networks:
      - app-network

  # --- Optional: ChromaDB (vector DB for RAG) ---
  chromadb:
    image: chromadb/chroma:latest
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME:-app}-chroma
    profiles: [cpu, nvidia, intel]
    environment:
      - IS_PERSISTENT=TRUE
      - CHROMA_SERVER_AUTH_PROVIDER=chromadb.auth.token.TokenAuthServerProvider
      - CHROMA_SERVER_AUTH_CREDENTIALS=${CHROMA_TOKEN:-changeme}
    volumes:
      - chromadata:/chroma/chroma
    ports:
      - "${CHROMA_PORT:-8000}:8000"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/heartbeat"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    networks:
      - app-network

  # --- Optional: FalkorDB (graph database) ---
  falkordb:
    image: falkordb/falkordb-server:latest
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME:-app}-falkordb
    profiles: [cpu, nvidia, intel]
    ports:
      - "${FALKOR_PORT:-6380}:6379"
    environment:
      - REDIS_ARGS=--requirepass ${REDIS_PASS:-changeme} --appendonly yes
    volumes:
      - falkordata:/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "${REDIS_PASS:-changeme}", "ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    networks:
      - app-network

  # ==========================================
  # APPLICATION LAYER
  # ==========================================

  frontend:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: services/web-frontend/Dockerfile
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME:-app}-frontend
    profiles: [cpu, nvidia, intel]
    ports:
      - "${FRONTEND_PORT:-3000}:80"
    depends_on:
      - backend-api
    networks:
      - app-network

  backend-api:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: services/backend-api/Dockerfile
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME:-app}-backend
    profiles: [cpu, nvidia, intel]
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgres://${DB_USER:-admin}:${DB_PASS:-changeme}@postgres-vector:5432/${DB_NAME:-app_db}
      REDIS_URL: redis://:${REDIS_PASS:-changeme}@redis-cache:6379/0
    depends_on:
      postgres-vector:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis-cache:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - app-network

  # ==========================================
  # AI INFERENCE WORKERS (Hardware Profiles)
  # ==========================================

  # --- CPU (Universal Fallback) ---
  ai-worker-cpu:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: services/ai-inference/Dockerfile
      args:
        DEVICE_TYPE: cpu
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME:-app}-ai-cpu
    profiles: [cpu]
    environment:
      - COMPUTE_DEVICE=CPU
    depends_on:
      backend-api:
        condition: service_started
    networks:
      - app-network

  # --- NVIDIA (CUDA Acceleration) ---
  ai-worker-nvidia:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: services/ai-inference/Dockerfile
      args:
        DEVICE_TYPE: gpu
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME:-app}-ai-nvidia
    profiles: [nvidia]
    environment:
      - COMPUTE_DEVICE=CUDA
      - NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=all
    deploy:
      resources:
        reservations:
          devices:
            - driver: nvidia
              count: 1
              capabilities: [gpu]
    depends_on:
      backend-api:
        condition: service_started
    networks:
      - app-network

  # --- Intel (OpenVINO / iGPU / NPU) ---
  ai-worker-intel:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: services/ai-inference/Dockerfile
      args:
        DEVICE_TYPE: openvino
    container_name: ${PROJECT_NAME:-app}-ai-intel
    profiles: [intel]
    environment:
      - COMPUTE_DEVICE=OPENVINO
      - ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR=level_zero:gpu
    devices:
      - /dev/dri:/dev/dri
      - /dev/accel:/dev/accel
    group_add:
      - video
      - render
    depends_on:
      backend-api:
        condition: service_started
    networks:
      - app-network

volumes:
  pgdata:
  redisdata:
  chromadata:
  falkordata:

networks:
  app-network:
    driver: bridge
```

## Service Selection Rules

Not all services are needed for every project. Include/exclude based on detection:

| Detected | Include in compose |
|----------|-------------------|
| Frontend framework (React, Vue, etc.) | `frontend` service |
| Ruby/Python/Node backend | `backend-api` service |
| AI/ML libraries in requirements | All 3 `ai-worker-*` profile variants |
| No AI workload | Omit `ai-worker-*` services entirely |
| pgvector or SQL files | `postgres-vector` service |
| ChromaDB in deps | `chromadb` service |
| FalkorDB in deps | `falkordb` service |
| Redis in deps (not via FalkorDB) | `redis-cache` service |
| No database detected | Omit data layer or include postgres as default |

## Environment File Template

Generate a `.env` file alongside compose.yaml:

```env
# Project
PROJECT_NAME=myapp

# Database
DB_USER=admin
DB_PASS=changeme
DB_NAME=app_db

# Redis
REDIS_PASS=changeme

# ChromaDB (if applicable)
CHROMA_TOKEN=changeme

# Ports
FRONTEND_PORT=3000
CHROMA_PORT=8000
FALKOR_PORT=6380
```

## Build Context Notes

- All Dockerfile paths are relative to the project root (context: `.`)
- This enables Dockerfiles inside `services/X/` to still COPY from the project root if needed
- For isolated builds (each service is its own context), change to `context: ./services/X`
